name: chascuro
description: A Fedimint wallet with experimental Marmot chat.

scripts.build:marmot-browser: npm run build:marmot-wasm && VITE_MARMOT_RUNTIME_PROBE=true tsc --noEmit && VITE_MARMOT_RUNTIME_PROBE=true vite build --mode e2e
scripts.build:production-chat: node scripts/validate-production-chat-config.mjs && npm run build:marmot-wasm && VITE_CHAT_MODE=mdk tsc --noEmit && VITE_CHAT_MODE=mdk vite build && node scripts/check-production-chat-bundle.mjs
scripts.check:marmot-wasm: runtime/marmot-web/scripts/cargo-wasm.sh check --locked --manifest-path runtime/marmot-web/Cargo.toml -p marmot-web-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && runtime/marmot-web/scripts/cargo-wasm.sh check --locked --manifest-path runtime/marmot-web/Cargo.toml -p marmot-web-wasi-engine --target wasm32-wasip1
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:e2e && playwright test e2e/offline-shell.spec.ts e2e/mobile-onboarding.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:sdk: VITE_WALLET_MODE=fedimint npm run build && playwright test e2e/sdk-worker-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:marmot-runtime: npm run build:marmot-browser && playwright test e2e/chat/mdk-runtime.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:marmot-relay: npm run build:marmot-browser && playwright test --config=e2e/config/playwright.marmot-relay.config.ts e2e/chat/mdk-relay-runtime.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:marmot-two-profile: npm run build:marmot-browser && playwright test --config=e2e/config/playwright.marmot-relay.config.ts e2e/chat/mdk-two-profile-runtime.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:marmot-product: npm run build:marmot-wasm && VITE_CHAT_MODE=mdk VITE_MARMOT_RELAYS=ws://127.0.0.1:4877/accept VITE_MARMOT_ALLOW_INSECURE_LOCALHOST=true VITE_TEST_WALLET_BYPASS=true npm run build:e2e && playwright test --config=e2e/config/playwright.marmot-relay.config.ts e2e/chat/mdk-product-flow.spec.ts e2e/chat/mdk-product-multi-conversation.spec.ts e2e/chat/mdk-pwa-hardening.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:marmot-native: npm run build:marmot-native-peer && npm run build:marmot-browser && playwright test --config=e2e/config/playwright.marmot-relay.config.ts e2e/chat/mdk-native-interoperability.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:marmot-runtime:cross-browser: npm run build:marmot-browser && playwright test --config=e2e/config/playwright.marmot-cross-browser.config.ts e2e/chat/mdk-runtime.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live: VITE_WALLET_MODE=fedimint npm run build && playwright test e2e/live-federation/compatibility.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
